title: Genetics and DNA: What is DNA? What are Genes?
author: BiosystemsHub Editorial Team
description: A clear introduction to DNA structure, gene function, and the genetic mechanisms behind traits such as eye color and blood type.

title: Introduction to Systems Biology: Understanding Life as an Integrated System
author: BiosystemsHub Editorial Team
description: An accessible introduction to systems biology — what it is, why it matters, and the key concepts and computational tools researchers use to study living organisms as integrated wholes.

title: How Cells Talk: A Quiet Language Written in Molecules
author: BiosystemsHub Editorial Team
description: Inside the elegant signalling networks that let trillions of cells coordinate without a conductor — an accessible guide to cellular communication, receptors, and signal transduction.
